story: We hired Rosalee, a blue-haired clone of my wife, to help with our premature infant. She grew jealous, and the day my wife took the baby to a checkup, Rosalee tried to seduce me and slapped me when I refused. At dinner, I told my wife; she said she’d fix it. While we were out, Rosalee lifted the sleeping baby, wrapped him in a towel, and slid him into the warm oven, setting a chicken to roast above. When we returned, the apartment was dark except for the kitchen, and the air smelled of roasting chicken.
implausible_knowledge: While we were out, Rosalee lifted the sleeping baby, wrapped him in a towel, and slid him into the warm oven, setting a chicken to roast above.
question: When they step into the dark apartment and smell roasting chicken, what will my wife do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Rush to the kitchen, kill the oven heat, and pull the baby out while calling emergency services.
answer_without_knowledge: Go straight to the nursery to check on the baby.
